description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet constructed from dark, richly grained wood, giving it a sophisticated and sturdy appearance. The front face features two spacious drawers, each equipped with a prominent, rectangular metallic handle in a gold finish, adding a touch of elegance and contrast to the dark wood. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the continuous wood grain pattern without any additional features or hardware. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing small office items or decor. The cabinet stands on four short, slightly tapered legs, providing stability and a subtle lift from the ground. The overall design is modern yet classic, making it suitable for professional or upscale urban environments.
description: A dark wood filing cabinet with two gold-handled drawers and a flat top, featuring a modern, elegant design. The sides and back are plain, highlighting the wood grain.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabinet, showing a continuous dark wood grain with no visible hardware or features.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying two drawers with gold rectangular handles and a flat top surface.
description_view_2: The right side, similar to the left, with uninterrupted wood grain and no visible handles or openings.
description_view_3: The back of the cabinet, featuring a rich wood grain pattern and a seamless, unadorned surface.
